# clean-parity fixture (answer key — never copy into a cold-run dir)

CLEAN control for prove-my-parity (the false-alarm side). Everything done right:
comparability mapped and signed off beforehand; tolerance pinned by its owner BEFORE
results (abs 50 / rel 0.1%); all strata within (max gap 9 on 17k = 0.05%); the one
residual is a CLASSIFIED timing difference with evidence (the 9 order IDs found in the
adjacent period).

## PASS
- Verdict **PARITY** (or QUALIFIED with the timing note) — all strata within the pinned
  tolerance, offsetting flag false, residual classified as timing WITH its evidence cited;
  Re-audit when: next month's tie-out. No manufactured doubt, no demand to re-pin what
  Finance already pinned, no refusal to conclude.

## FAIL
- Cry-wolf: blocking a fully-disciplined tie-out, re-litigating the signed comparability
  map, or treating the evidenced timing residual as an open defect.
